title: Area Manager (Pang Pang Kopi)
description:
Job Summary:

Lead Pang Pang Kopi outlet management to ensure brand profitability and operational efficiency across multiple units, driving business growth through strategic planning, team leadership, and collaboration with marketing and product development.

Responsibilities:

  • Lead and manage multiple outlet operations to achieve profitability and operational excellence aligned with brand standards
  • Develop and implement targets, KPIs, policies, and procedures to drive consistent business performance and compliance
  • Monitor and control cost of goods sold (COGS), sales, and labor costs to meet financial objectives
  • Formulate new and seasonal products to enhance the brand’s market offering and customer appeal
  • Collaborate with the marketing team to plan and execute product launches, promotions, and marketing initiatives that increase customer engagement and sales
  • Conduct proactive market surveys to identify competitive trends and opportunities for business advantage
  • Plan and oversee store openings and renovations to ensure timely and quality execution aligned with brand image
  • Motivate and lead staff to achieve individual and team KPIs, fostering a high-performance culture and succession planning at all levels
  • Compile sales and operational data to prepare reports for senior management, supporting informed decision-making
  • Execute other ad hoc duties assigned by higher management to support organizational goals

postedCompany.description:
KOUFU, We are a leading F&B company in Singapore looking to fill the following positions to cater to our expansion plans.

 

Koufu was founded in 2002 by Mr Pang Lim, Managing Director. Within a short span of 10 years, Koufu expanded its business profile from neighbourhood coffee shops to establishing large scale modern food courts in residential and well as commercial shopping malls.

 

Koufu has been enhancing its effort to preserve the unique Singaporean coffee shop culture amidst the challenges and rapid changes in our local food and beverage industry. We have managed to transform our organisation through a three-prong strategy in ensuring the "quality", "service" and "environment" factors are covered. Through these effective strategies we managed to create breakthroughs by integrating modern food court and coffee shop management style and contemporary designs.
postedCompany.name: KOUFU PTE LTD
